hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng (Tru by Hilton Da Nang City Centre)

reviews.title: Third class Staff and facility n food also
reviews.text:
Too much small hotel just like lodge 
Rude staff 
Very small room like Mumbai kholi
Actual it’s a tru lodge not hotel

reviews.title: Really good hotel if location is not an issue or the space in the room
reviews.positives: Cool designed rooms, very functional
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was very basic. Coffee was bad

reviews.title: Very small room
reviews.text: The room was very small for even a couple. Beds were laid on the platform. Didn’t have any space to move. In the same amount of money you can get a better deal.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Purnima,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

We are sorry to hear that you found the room size smaller than expected. We understand how important comfortable space is for our guests, and we truly appreciate your honest comments. Our Twin Bed Rooms are designed for functionality, and your feedback will help us consider ways to enhance guest comfort in the future.

We are glad to know you stayed with us and hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back for a more enjoyable experience.

Warm regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Da Nang City Centre

reviews.title: Loved my stay on this hotel
reviews.positives:
Loved everything about my stay at Tru by Hilton Da Nang. The hotel had such a nice vibe from the reception all the way to the rooms. Everything was functional without being excessive or too minimal; the simple décor and ambience were just right. The room had nice quality linen and bath towels. Special kudos to Gary at reception for changing my room upon request without any fuss, truly appreciated the smooth and professional service. Breakfast was simple, but perfectly fine for me.
Overall, a very comfortable and enjoyable stay. Would definitely return.
reviews.negatives: A couple of small improvements could make the experience even better: soundproofing in the rooms could have been better and adding a non-slip mat in the shower would provide extra comfort and safety.

reviews.title: Ko xứng đáng giá tiền
reviews.text: Phòng quá nhỏ, ko đủ dụng cụ ve sinh cơ bản. Đồ ăn sáng quá dở và ko có sự lựa chọn nhiều.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Ms Uyen,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm. Chúng tôi rất tiếc vì phòng và bữa sáng chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của quý khách. Những góp ý của quý khách về kích thước phòng, tiện nghi và chất lượng bữa sáng sẽ được chúng tôi nghiêm túc xem xét để cải thiện dịch vụ trong tương lai.

Rất mong có cơ hội được đón tiếp quý khách trở lại và mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn.

Trân trọng,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The clean air and automatic blackout curtains
reviews.negatives: The moldy washer that ruined our clothes

reviews.title: Pleasant surprise for last minute booking
reviews.text: It was a rush booking for us. We were pleasantly surprised. The lobby area was unexpected but the rooms were good. Clean sheets, comfy mattress. A small Japanese style  bathroom - a tad small but it was ok. No complaints. Would stay there again
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Elaine,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback.

We are glad to hear that, despite your last-minute booking, you were pleasantly surprised by your stay. It is wonderful to know that you found the rooms clean and comfortable, with fresh linens and a good mattress.

We also appreciate your honest comments regarding the size of the bathroom and our facilities. Your feedback is valuable and will help us as we continue to improve our offerings for future guests.

We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit and providing another enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Da Nang City Centre

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Friendly staff and clean rooms.
reviews.negatives: More variety at breakfast would be nice

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Acceptable, crowded position, confined, difficult for cars to enter and exit.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff were so friendly , room was very clean and conformable
reviews.negatives: Breakfast

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: This hotel is on low budget side of hotels under well known Hilton name. Room is small and take advantages of every corner for functions. The toilet is divided by a glass wall which doesn’t give much privacy and noise cancellation. If I stay with my bf or husband it would be an embarrassment for me to use toilet when he’s inside. There’s only stairs for hotel entrance which made me carry extra heavy over 10-step-stair. Not pleasant at all.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest;

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the issues you experienced with the bathroom privacy and the hotel entrance. Your comments are very valuable and will be considered as we continue to improve our guest experience.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.

Kind regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.positives: Comfort, cleanliness, breakfast
reviews.negatives: A bit of construction noise from outside, but really wasn’t bad at all

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Clean and worth the money near the central dining area of the city.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your excellent feedback. We are delighted to hear that you found our hotel clean, worth the value, and conveniently located near the city center and dining options. Your kind words mean a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another pleasant stay.

Warm regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Probably one of the cleanest hotels I've stayed at. Very modernl and well maintained. Friendly and helpful staff, spacious shower and very good breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Some more storage space for clothes would be great.

reviews.title: A small but tidy accommodation.
reviews.text: It is a small but clean accommodation. It is within a 10-minute walk to the market. The staff are friendly, and a simple breakfast is also provided.

reviews.title: Our stay was excellent. Staff were very helpful and was able to check us in early.
reviews.positives: Tour buses could pick us up easily from our hotel, yet it was away from a more touristy area.
reviews.negatives: None. We had a great stay.

reviews.title: Good, but room small
reviews.text: I’m very pleased with the attentiveness of staff. Room is modern but quite small compared to other hotels available in Danang. Breakfast buffet is good but there isn’t a great variety of food.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Chun;

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are pleased to know that you appreciated the attentiveness of our staff and enjoyed our breakfast buffet. We also take note of your comments regarding the room size and food variety, and we will work on improvements to enhance our guest experience.

We truly appreciate your input and hope to welcome you back on your next visit to Danang.

Warm regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Excellent! I will comeback! Worth to stay!
reviews.positives:
The room is clean.  I like  the rolling curtain.
Toilet nice and clean my wife loves it.
Gym available,  and the laundry drying machine is absolutely perfect. 
Breakfast bun bao with Pho Ga so delicious!
Ms Linh is so kind helping us our tour package.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: New style in the center of Da Nang.
reviews.text:
I have 2 nights to stay here for work. The room is clean and newly furnished. 
But there are two downsides I would like to suggest:
1/ The reception is not really friendly.
2/ The WiFi here is too weak to work.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff were friendly and professional especially ANH. Room was clean and looking new
reviews.negatives: Didn’t have umbrella to compare with other hotels. Raining heavy during my stays.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: There is construction next to the hotel and it's noisy.

reviews.title: Sympa mais pas au niveau d’un « Hilton »
reviews.positives: L’emplacement est pas trop mal
reviews.negatives:
L’eau de la salle de bain stagne et reste mouillée pendant quelques heures. 
De plus, on nous a facturé des serviettes de mains manquantes, que nous n’avons pas avec nous (qu’allons nous faire avec?)
J’avais une belle vue mais mon ami qui avait une deuxième chambre au même étage avait une baie vitrée avec la vue cachée par un brise soleil métallique.  
De plus, les chambres étaient mal insonorisées, j’entendais tous mes voisins

reviews.title: Overall good
reviews.text: The room is fully equipped; however, there is no wardrobe, which is a bit inconvenient. The mirror is a bit low. It seems that the design is aimed at accommodating people with disabilities. Overall, it's quite okay for the price range.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Tu;
Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear that you found the room well-equipped and suitable for your stay. We appreciate your comments regarding the wardrobe and mirror and will take them into consideration.

We hope to welcome you again on your future visits.

Kind regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Nous n'y avons passé qu'une seule nuit avant de partir sur Hué.
Hotel bien situé, à proximité de la gare, pratique pour prendre le train.
Chambre d'un très bon rapport qualité prix, personnel courtois et professionnel

reviews.title: Great Stay at Tru!
reviews.text:
Sparkling clean rooms, super comfortable bed & AC, and very warm and accommodating staff. 

Thank you to Tru by Hilton for making our stay relaxing and convenient. Special thanks to Khai for the attentive and excellent service during breakfast. 

Very accessible location and so easy to book a Grab anytime. We will definitely be back!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Sauberkeit
reviews.negatives: Preisverhältnis

reviews.title: Wonderful Stay at Tru by Hilton!
reviews.text:
Wonderful stay at tru by Hilton!

Sparkling clean rooms, comfy bed & AC, warm and accommodating staff, and a very accessible location.

Special thanks to Khai for the attentive and A1 service during breakfast. 

We will definitely be back!

reviews.title: Schönes Zimme und leckeres Frühstück. Zu Fuß kann man auch vieles erreichen. Aber das Personal ist eine 0/10
reviews.positives: Unterkunft war sauber und Frühstück war gut.
reviews.negatives: Leider war das Personal sehr unfreundlich. Keiner der Mitarbeiter hat gelächelt, und wenn man eine Frage hatte, hatte man eher das Gefühl, dass sie sich gezwungen fühlten, mit einem zu sprechen. Als wir zum Beispiel nachfragen wollten, ob das Hotel auch Touren anbietet, wurden wir sowohl vom jungen Mann als auch von der jungen Frau an der Rezeption sehr irritiert und fast erschrocken angeschaut. Wir sind direkt aus Hanoi angereist und waren dort einen ganz anderen Service gewohnt. Obwohl wir dort sogar günstigere Hotels gebucht hatten. Vielleicht wechselt man das Personal aus.

reviews.title: Don
reviews.text: I love tge place as we was stay in hanoi with tru by hilton.Danang even better.Room was comfortable and super clean.Excellent valued 9f m9ney.Had amazing time

reviews.title: Perfekter Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Klare Empfehlung
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Klein aber fein.
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliches Personal und einfach strukturierte, saubere Zimmer.
reviews.negatives: Etwas hellhörig.

reviews.title: First time
reviews.text: Very clean and affordable.
reviews.response:
Dear Values Guest,

Thank you very much for your kind feedback! We’re delighted to know that you found our hotel very clean and affordable. Your satisfaction is our greatest reward, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience.

We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Warm regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Da Nang City Center

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel
reviews.positives: Super sauberes Hotel mit verspielter Lobby (Schachbrett, Tischkicker uvm.) und sehr gemütlichen Zimmern welche man komplett abdunkeln kann. Auch das Frühstücksbuffet war ein toller Mix aus lokalem Essen, Früchten und westlichen Speisen. Da wird definitiv jeder fündig.

reviews.title: Tru by Hilton
reviews.text: Amazing stay, clean room, friendly staff. Book it blindfolded.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr.Prasoon,

Thank you for your wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay, found the room clean, and appreciated our staff. Your kind words are greatly appreciated.

We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit.

Kind regards,
Tham Nguyen
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Als Zwischenstopp perfekt
reviews.positives: Perfekte Lage, sehr sauber!
reviews.negatives: Waschmaschinen haben die Wäsche sehr schlecht gewaschen. Man sollte selbst Waschmittel benutzen.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
조식당 서브하시는 분만 찬절한곳... 
3성급도 안되는것 같은데 5성급인줄 아는 남자 매니저분..

reviews.title: Da migliorare sulla colazione
reviews.positives: Hotel nuovo, pulito e moderno. Posizione ottima e camere con vista. Nel complesso buon rapporto qualità-prezzo.
reviews.negatives: Colazione terribile: la peggiore di sempre. Pochissima scelta, pane raffermo e frutta con moscerini.

reviews.title: 다낭 골프여행
reviews.text: 힐튼 체인이라 그런지 침구류 샤워실 매우 깨끗함 , 숙박만 한것이라면 최고의 선택 임

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Struttura centrale, moderna e pulita.
reviews.negatives: Il bagno troppo stretto e con scarsa aspirazione. Inoltre, non e perfettamente insonorizzato: si sentono i rumori delle auto. Colazione non molto soddisfacente: poca varietà di prodotti, soprattutto l’angolo dei dolci.

reviews.title: 개인여행자에게 정말 깔끔, 깨끗한 숙소
reviews.text: 방 크기를 희생한 대신, 룸컨디션이 정말 훌륭합니다. 청결과 인테리어 최고점수드립니다. 개인여행자라면 방크기도 크게문제되지않습니다.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La posizione,  la pulizia,  la gentilezza del personale che è immediatamente accorso quando non riuscivo a far funzionare la lavatrice. Molto silenzioso
reviews.negatives:
Forse dovrebbe esserci una colazione con più cose dolci. Comunque era molto buona.
L'ingresso dovrebbe essere più accessibile e la porta di vetro meno pesante visto che si entra con le valigie.

reviews.title: ‏לא ממש הילטון אבל גם בסדר
reviews.text:
‏מדובר במלון lowcost 
‏אין בריכה אין שירותי חדרים הרמה היא כן גבוה אבל ביחס לתמורה יש דברים טובים יותר בעיר

reviews.title: Een goed hotel op loopafstand van de rivier boulevard.
reviews.positives: Uitstekende faciliteiten, nette kamer en zeer vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel.
reviews.negatives: Eigenlijk weinig.

reviews.title: Hyvä hinta ja laatu
reviews.text: Hotellihuone on todella yksinkertainen, mutta ei se mielestäni tarvitse muuta kuin hyvän sängyn ja oman wc. Molemmat löytyy ja huone on muutenkin erittäin moderni. Aamupala on ihan ok tasoa näin Vietnamin tasoon verrattuna. Eurooppalaiselle se on melko suppea valikoimaltaan. Suosittelisin kyllä hotellia jokaiselle etenkin pariskunnille.

reviews.title: Fijn verblijf voor 1 of 2 nachten in een simpele en schone kamer
reviews.positives: Schoon en netjes. Interieur zag er ook goed uit

reviews.title: 空間小
reviews.text: 空間小到不可思議

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 去哪裡都很方便，離市中心很近。 採購，按摩，逛市場。都很快就到。推薦大家。早餐有河粉無限量。
reviews.negatives: 無

reviews.title: 平價的優質旅館
reviews.text:
服務設施都令人滿意早餐也很棒唯一的缺點就是附近吃飯不方便 當然 如果願意走500米到韓市場邊 選擇還是蠻多的 
P.S.肯德基就在旁邊 儂特利也沒有很遠 如果習慣吃速食的話 到也算不錯
想運動的話除了旅館自帶的健身房 旁邊就有一個皮克球場

reviews.title: 乾淨且舒服的住宿
reviews.positives:
這間旅館很新，所以很乾淨，如果對清潔度有比較高要求的可以選擇。
離峴港的一些主要景點不算太近，要走一些路，不過，峴港的Grob很方便，而且也便宜，足以彌補這個缺陷，房間面積只能打開一個29吋的行李箱，我想這是唯一的缺點。

reviews.title: 開心愉快
reviews.positives:
設備新穎，房間內的東西規劃動線非常順暢好用
服務親切
超推薦👍👍👍
建議中間的時間可以安排來這邊
還可以付費吸引衣服
reviews.negatives: 一切都很好

reviews.title: 최고의 위치.
reviews.positives: 위치
reviews.negatives: 전혀 없음

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: מיקום סבבה, חדר כושר בסדר
reviews.negatives: חדרים ממש ממש קטנים, אין גמישות בצ׳ק אין

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ
reviews.negatives: Giá tiền chưa phù hợp

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ngay trung tâm thành phố, đi lại thuận tiệ

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Vị trí trung tâm, ngay cầu Sông Hàn, khách sạn hiện đại sạch sẽ, vì là loại hình đặc thù của Hilton nên sẽ k có bảo vệ hay doorman xách hành lý, nhân viên lễ tân sẽ đa nhiệm, kiêm luôn pha chế 😅. Phòng rất sạch, tuy nhiên khá chật, toilet sạch nhưng sàn rất trơn, phòng chỉ sử dụng cho mục đích công tác và 2 người đàn ông ở đơn giản thì phù hợp, k có bông tăm và lược, bàn làm việc chung với gương và bồn rửa mặt 😅
Giường to, êm ái sạch sẽ, có nút bấm hạ rèm cũng khá hay, ăn sáng cơ bản, tự phục vụ 100% (kể cả món phở) và vị thì k ngon, với giá ~1tr5/đêm thì sẽ có nhiều option hơn, k có gì để chê, k phù hợp với đối tượng gia đình hoặc đi du lịch với nhiều vali to.

reviews.title: Đáng quay lại nhưng hy vọng khách sạn sẽ cải thiện để tốt hơn
reviews.positives: Vị trí thuận tiện, nội thất còn mới, không gian nhỏ nhưng đầy đủ tiện nghi, giường và gối rất êm. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, chu đáo , vui vẻ
reviews.negatives: Phòng không có cách âm nên hơi ồn, ăn sáng ngon nhưng hơi ít món không có thay đổi nhiều qua các ngày, khi đông thì fill đồ hơi chậm.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: tiện lợi
reviews.negatives: Ăn sáng chưa đủ hấp dẫn và phong phú món ăn

reviews.title: Ok

reviews.negatives: Diện tích phòng

reviews.negatives: Giường chăn ga gối vải nóng và ngứa

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Красивый дизайн помещений, чисто, уютно. Очень удобные кровати, красивая подсветка, очень плотные шторы. Хороший разнообразный завтрак ( европейские и местные блюда)
reviews.negatives: Очень маленький номер для нас, не обратила внимание, когда бронировала Шум от стройки мешал спать, но дали беруши, за что отдельное спасибо

reviews.negatives: Worst stay manipulative manager better to stay away

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The hotel is clean and hygenic. They offer good breakfast for the budget. Good hotel for transit stay or people travelling for business.
reviews.negatives: The standard king bedrooms are extremely small. Not cut for a family to stay The view is of construction site with alot of noise.

reviews.title: The stay was acceptable, but it was not worth the price
reviews.positives: Clean, beautiful rooms with a good view on the skyline, laundry self-service available, fast internet connection and good breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Uninterested and uninformed receptionists, construction works ongoing - also on Sunday morning - without any notification. The garage was partly blocked by it, such that the motorbikes were unaccessible. The road nearby is very noisy - also at night.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Big window n bed
reviews.negatives:
No kettle
Sink outside is plain bad idea

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean. Staff was good. Breakfast was ok
reviews.negatives: Since it's a business hotel room size is small. For two it would be very congested.

reviews.title: Poor service, no bell service, no food order after 10pm, ine staff on duty to do all, tiny rooms, poor breakfast, TV doe

Bright, spacious, clean room

reviews.positives: Modern and clean

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent accommodation in the perfect location, for me.
reviews.negatives: Perhaps a bit more information for tourists.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The best place

reviews.title: Bom para estadias curtas
reviews.positives: O café da manhã é um pouco limitado, mas tinha opções gostosas. Senti falta de mais opções de bebidas, mais sucos e disponibilidade de café. As camas são confortáveis e a limpeza é boa.
reviews.negatives: Os quartos são bem pequenos. Senti falta da disponibilização de uma ajuda maior na movimentação pelo hotel, parecia que havia poucos funcionários, eles eram educados, mas também não faziam muito. Foi diferente de outras experiências que tive no Vietnã.
